assignments.name: payload
assignments.value:
={{
(() => {
  const n = (v) => {
    const x = Number(v ?? 0);
    return Number.isFinite(x) ? x : 0;
  };
  const s = (v, def='all') => (v === undefined || v === null || v === '' ? def : String(v));

  return {
    // chave temporal
    date: $json.date_start,
    date_start: $json.date_start,
    date_stop: $json.date_stop,

    // ids
    account_id: Number($json.account_id),
    act_account_id: `act_${$json.account_id}`,
    campaign_id: Number($json.campaign_id),
    adset_id: Number($json.adset_id),
    ad_id: Number($json.ad_id),

    // meta
    objective: $json.objective || null,
    optimization_goal: $json.optimization_goal || null,

    // core
    spend: n($json.spend_zero),
    impressions: n($json.impressions_zero),
    clicks_all: n($json.clicks_zero),
    reach: n($json.reach_zero),
    unique_clicks: n($json.unique_clicks_zero),
    link_click: n($json.actions_link_click_zero),
    landing_page_view: n($json.actions_landing_page_view_zero),

    // breakdowns
    publisher_platform: s($json.publisher_platform_zero, 'all'),
    platform_position: s($json.platform_position, 'all'),
    device_platform: s($json.device_platform, 'all'),
    impression_device: s($json.impression_device, 'all'),

    // engagements
    page_engagement: n($json.actions_page_engagement_zero),
    post_engagement: n($json.actions_post_engagement_zero),
    post_save: n($json.actions_onsite_conversion_post_save_zero),
    post_reaction: n($json.actions_post_reaction_zero),
    post_comment: n($json.actions_comment_zero),
    post: n($json.actions_post_zero),
    post_like: n($json.actions_like_zero),

    // messaging
    messaging_total: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.total_messaging_connection_zero']),
    messaging_conversation_started_7d: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_conversation_started_7d_zero']),
    messaging_block: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_block_zero']),
    messaging_first_reply: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_first_reply_zero']),
    messaging_2_message_send: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_2_message_send_zero']),
    messaging_3_message_send: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_3_message_send_zero']),
    messaging_5_message_send: n($json['actions_onsite_conversion.messaging_user_depth_5_message_send_zero']),

    // funnel actions
    contact: n($json.contact_total_zero),
    initiate_checkout: n($json.actions_initiate_checkout_zero),
    initiate_checkout_value: n($json.action_values_initiate_checkout_zero),
    lead: n($json.actions_lead_zero),
    purchase: n($json.actions_purchase_zero),
    purchase_value: n($json.action_values_purchase_zero),
    add_to_cart: n($json.action_add_to_cart_zero),
    add_to_cart_value: n($json.action_values_add_to_cart_zero),
    complete_registration: n($json.actions_complete_registration_zero),
    view_content: n($json.actions_view_content_zero),
    subscriptions: n($json.actions_subscriptions_zero),
    schedule: n($json.actions_schedule_zero),

    // video
    video_avg_time_watched: n($json.video_avg_time_watched_zero),
    video_p25_watched: n($json.video_p25_watched_zero),
    video_p50_watched: n($json.video_p50_watched_zero),
    video_p75_watched: n($json.video_p75_watched_zero),
    video_p95_watched: n($json.video_p95_watched_zero),
    video_p100_watched: n($json.video_p100_watched_zero),
    video_play: n($json.video_play_zero),
    video_2s_watched: n($json.video_2s_watched),
    video_3s_watched: n($json.video_view_zero),
    video_10s_watched: n($json.video_10s_watched),
    video_15s_watched: n($json.video_15s_watched),
    video_30s_watched: n($json.video_30s_watched),
    video_60s_watched: n($json.video_60s_watched)
  };
})()
}}

={{
(() => {
  const n = (v) => {
    const x = Number(v ?? 0);
    return Number.isFinite(x) ? x : 0;
  };
  const s = (v, def='all') => (v === undefined || v === null || v === '' ? def : String(v));

  return {
    // chave temporal
    date: $json.date_start,
    date_start: $json.date_start,
    date_stop: $json.date_stop,

    // ids
    account_id: Number($json.account_id),
    act_account_id: `act_${$json.account_id}`,
    campaign_id: Number($json.campaign_id),
    adset_id: Number($json.adset_id),
    ad_id: Number($json.ad_id),

    // meta
    objective: $json.objective || null,
    optimization_goal: $json.optimization_goal || null,

    // core
    spend: n($json.spend_zero),
    impressions: n($json.impressions_zero),
    clicks_all: n($json.clicks_zero),
    reach: n($json.reach_zero),
    unique_clicks: n($json.unique_clicks_zero),
    link_click: n($json.actions_link_click_zero),
    landing_page_view: n($json.actions_landing_page_view_zero),

    // breakdowns
    publisher_platform: s($json.publisher_platform_zero, 'all'),
    platform_position: s($json.platform_position, 'all'),
    device_platform: s($json.device_platform, 'all'),
    impression_device: s($json.impression_device, 'all'),

    // engagements
    page_engagement: n($json.actions_page_engagement_zero),
    post_engagement: n($json.actions_post_engagement_zero),
    post_save: n($json.actions_onsite_conversion_post_save_zero),
